stemHtml: When there is a pressure difference between the two sides of a pressure-operated ice detector, the…

options.a: probe starts to vibrate until the differential pressure reaches zero.
options.b: probe starts to rotate until maximum deflection and then the “icing light” comes on.
options.c: heater in the probe melts the ice in the larger hole first.
options.d: heater in the probe melts the ice in the smaller holes first.
